executiveSummary.headline: One sentence: e.g. 3 fiction KPIs and 12 production-path sample references found — none blocked merge today because gate is not wired.

credentials.summary: No credential patterns detected, or list file:line with pattern type.

fictionKpis.summary: Sample JSON still contains known template fiction.

items.recommendedAction: Serve measured data via API; do not hardcode sample paths

productionLeaks.summary: Production code references mock/sample JSON paths.

schemaDrift.summary: Page sample JSON missing required keys vs registered specs.

immediate: Add simplebeacon scan --gate to PR workflow
Fix high-severity fiction KPIs and credential findings
Centralize sample loading in one allowlisted module (if using stub architecture)
next30Days: Review production-leak allowlist — only seed/registry files
Publish internal rule: no totalFeatures: <rejected-feature-count> / completionRate: <rejected-completion-rate> in measured samples

keepUsing: Snyk or GitHub Advanced Security for CVEs
addSimplebeaconFor: Hardcoded sample paths in production directories

pilotProposal.ask: Will you run simplebeacon scan --gate on every PR for 2 weeks?
